title: The Secret Behind The Coca-Cola Marketing Strategy - Vocabulary

section.title: The Secret Behind The Coca-Cola Marketing Strategy - Vocabulary
section.summary: Marketing, branding, advertising, and retail distribution terms used in the context of global business strategy.

questions.prompt: What is the meaning of 'a counter' in this context?
questions.explanation: According to the vocabulary list, 'a counter' means 'un comptoir'.
